mapper.sql: l.id, l.property_id, p.property_code, l.lead_code, l.lead_name, l.source, l.status, l.stage
mapper.select: SELECT FROM lead l INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = l.property_id WHERE l.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(l.lead_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.lead_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.source) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.stage) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%')) ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead l WHERE l.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(l.lead_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.lead_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.source) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(l.stage) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM lead l INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = l.property_id WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM lead l INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = l.property_id WHERE l.lead_code = #{leadCode} AND l.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lead (tenant_id, property_id, lead_code, lead_name, source, status, stage) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{leadCode}, #{leadName}, #{source}, #{status}, #{stage})
mapper.update: UPDATE lead SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, lead_code = #{request.leadCode}, lead_name = #{request.leadName}, source = #{request.source}, status = #{request.status}, stage = #{request.stage}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE lead SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
